note: Representative sign codes by category -- full catalogue in RDM 6.2 Appendix 5. Not every individual sign variant is listed; representative examples given.

categories.description: Priority signs indicating right of way
categories.notes: STOP sign is octagonal red with white text. GIVE WAY is inverted triangle with red border.

examples: M4 Straight Ahead or Turn Left
categories.shape: Circular, blue background with white symbol
categories.notes: Small (600 mm) for single carriageway <=50 km/h. Normal (750 mm) for >50 km/h. Large (900 mm) for dual carriageway.

categories.description: Prohibitory signs -- drivers must not do specified action
categories.shape: Circular, white background with red border (most). Speed limits are red circle with number.
categories.notes: Largest category of regulatory signs. Speed limit P5 (50 km/h built-up), P6 (70), P7 (80), P8 (120 expressway).

categories.description: Warning signs alerting drivers to hazards ahead
categories.shape: Triangular (equilateral, point up), red border on white background
categories.notes: Sizes per Table 4.1: 900 mm for Class A/B/UA (>65 km/h), 750 mm for C/D/UC (50-65 km/h), 600 mm for E/UL/F-W (<50 km/h).

examples: I5 Direction Sign (for Class A/B and collectors)
categories.sizes_mm: Variable -- depends on content, letter height, and number of destinations
categories.shape: Rectangular with pointed end (direction signs). Rectangular (others).
categories.notes: Colour scheme from Table 2.6: Expressway=blue bg/white text; Class A,B,UA=green bg/white text/yellow route; Class C,D,UC=white bg/black text; Class E-W,UL=white bg/black text.

examples: I8 Alternative Route for Heavy Vehicle
I23-I31 Amenities (eating, fuel, toilet, picnic, camp)
categories.notes: Tourist signs use brown background. Facility signs typically blue.

categories.shape: Rectangular, blue background with white symbol
Triangular (warning type) or rectangular, yellow background with black border
categories.notes: Detailed deployment scenarios in Appendix 4 with layout figures A4-1 to A4-22.
